message:
perf: add inline cache (IC) to switch-dispatch frozen codegen

The switch-dispatch codegen (zig_codegen_full.zig) was the only codegen
path without inline caching for property access. Every get_field/get_field2
opcode went through full C FFI (JS_GetPropertyStr → atom hash lookup →
shape/property walk) on every call.

With IC enabled, the first access populates a shape+offset cache. Subsequent
accesses with matching shape do a single pointer dereference in Zig — zero
C FFI. This is critical for TSC which does millions of property accesses
(.kind, .flags, .pos, .end, .parent, etc.) on AST nodes.
